title: Iran War: US Can't Reopen Strait of Hormuz on Its Own — Bloomberg analysis
snippet: Bloomberg analysis argues the US cannot unilaterally reopen the Strait of Hormuz without cooperation from Iran or allied nations. IRGC mines, fast boats, and coastal missile batteries create a layered defense. Minesweeping alone would take months. NATO allies have refused joint operations. Unilateral clearance would risk massive military escalation with Iran. 800 ships remain trapped in Persian Gulf.
tag_reason: 블룸버그의 '미국 단독 호르무즈 개방 불가' 분석은 신규 전문가 평가.
